name: color-picker
title: Color Picker
description: Swatch trigger with hex trailing and channel editors.

api.description: Pill swatch trigger with optional hex or clear trailing, and channel editors in a popover.

props.name: value
props.description: Current color as a hex string (required).

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name for the swatch trigger.

props.name: trailing
props.description: Optional trailing control: show hex text, or a clear action.

props.name: clearLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the clear control.

props.name: Popover editors
props.description: Opened panel supports hex, rgb, hsl, and hsb channel modes (not separate props).

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-color-picker-hex-width
props.description: Fixed width for the hex label on the pill trigger so it does not reflow while dragging.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.
